name: Italian Vegetable Ragout
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Brussels sprouts, tough leaves removed and ends trimmed
1 medium cauliflower, cut into large florets
1 pound Swiss chard, tough stems removed and torn into bite-size pieces
1 tablespoon fresh marjoram or 1 teaspoon dried marjoram
1 large zucchini, ends trimmed and cut into 1-inch cubes
2 large carrots, peeled and sliced thinly on the diagonal
16 ounces canned chick peas, drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Cook potatoes, Brussels sprouts, and cauliflower for five minutes. Add Swiss chard and cook one minute more. Reserve half cup of the cooking liquid.
2. Drain vegetables; set aside.
3. Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat. Add onion, celery, and garlic; sauté three minutes.
4. Stir in marjoram, reserved cooking liquid, tomatoes, zucchini, carrots, salt, pepper, and reserved vegetables. Stir well, cover, and cook over medium-low heat until vegetables are just cooked through, 15 to 20 minutes.
5. Stir in chick peas and gently heat through. Transfer to a serving dish and garnish with basil. Serve over whole wheat spaghetti or steamed brown rice.
